name: Kōki
bio: Seeking balance between nature and intellect, Kōki believes that harmony is the key to understanding the world.

name: Ryūjin
bio: Ryūjin is driven by an insatiable curiosity, seeking to unravel the mysteries of existence. His wisdom comes from piercing through illusions.
speech_style: With a hint of dry wit and a dash of sarcasm

name: Kazuya
bio: Kazuya is a master of nuance, discerning the gray areas between right and wrong. He believes that wisdom lies in recognizing the complexity of human nature.
speech_style: With a measured tone, emphasizing nuances and subtleties

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
